title: A move to top option in widget settings
excerpt: I create multiple Text widgets to house notes from meetings. When I create a new widget, it goes to the bottom of the screen (view/page). I prefer to have my newest notes at the top but moving them manually is difficult …

posts.author: msully (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml:
I create multiple Text widgets to house notes from meetings. When I create a new widget, it goes to the bottom of the screen (view/page). I prefer to have my newest notes at the top but moving them manually is difficult as the widgets cannot be easily dragged around.

I would like a “Move to Top” option added with the other options for quicker movement.
